name: Presa and Salted Carrots
steps: Rinse well in the sink before peeling.
Peel carrots to remove sand remnants.
Re-wash again to ensure no sand remains.
Slice the carrots and pass through a mandolin to 3mm thickness.
Weigh carrots. Add 2% of the total weight in salt and juice.
Vacuum and leave at room temperature for 4-7 days.
Once fermented, remove carrots and slice to desired thickness.
Vacuum slice in bags needed per service and freeze.
When needed, add 3.5% kuzu and cook slowly until above 65 degrees and the sauce appears.
Set oil bath to 60 degrees in circulator.
Place Presa in oil bath for pasteurisation.
Place oil in bath until temperature is 53 degrees.
Place on yakitori and smoke over pine.
